/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/correcao.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/textrendering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/tiny_obj_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/glad.c.o -o /home/nrdc/org/roam/projects/programming/parametric-and-procedural/source/bin/Linux/main  -ldl -lm /home/nrdc/org/roam/projects/programming/parametric-and-procedural/source/lib-linux/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXinerama.so
